name: DOCTOR
description: Medical professional aesthetic — clean clinical setting meets high fashion. Unexpected and sharp.
asset_requirements: Any clean product photo. White/light clothing creates strongest contrast against the clinical environment.

input_manifest.label: Product Image
input_manifest.hint: Front-facing product on any clean background. White or light colors stand out best in the clinical setting.

steps.prompt: Fashion editorial in a medical/clinical setting. A model wearing the clothing product poses in a clean clinic or hospital hallway. Sterile white walls, clinical lighting, stainless steel elements in background. The fashion clothing contrasts sharply with the medical environment. Think Balenciaga runway meets ER. The clothing product is crisp, detailed, and clearly shown.

Clinical fashion video. Model in the clothing product walks through a clean white hospital corridor, clinical fluorescent lighting, sterile environment creates high contrast with the fashion clothing, slow confident walk, camera tracks alongside the model.
